name: Service account with high privileges is inactive for over 90 days
description: An IAM role or service account with high privileges has not been used in over 90 days, indicating potential over-provisioning and creating unnecessary attack surface
conditions: role_last_used.last_used_date < NOW() - 90 days OR role_last_used IS NULL
remediation: 1. Review if the role is still needed. 2. If unused, delete or disable the role. 3. If needed, apply least privilege principles. 4. Enable CloudTrail logging to monitor future usage.
